cards.back: Principles that guide the design of user interfaces and experiences to be user-centered, intuitive, and aesthetically pleasing.
A written description of a user's goals and tasks, used to guide the development of a mobile application.
A low-fidelity visual representation of a mobile application's layout and user flow, used to plan and design the application's user interface.
The selection and use of typefaces, font sizes, and line spacing to communicate meaning and create a visually appealing user interface.
A design approach that ensures a mobile application adapts to different screen sizes, orientations, and devices to provide an optimal user experience.
